gloss_en: How are you today? What's happening at the market?
notes: šlōnak greeting, šaku māku idiom (erwin1963 §intro; blanc1964); monophthong ō in شلون

gloss_en: The weather is very hot in Baghdad in the summer.
notes: hwāya 'very' (erwin1963 s.v.); ج=/dʒ/; geminates وّ رّ; emphatic ص with backing

sentence: مَا أَرِيد قَهْوَة، خَلِّي نِشْرَب چَاي بِالْهَيل.
raw: ما أريد قهوة، خلي نشرب چاي بالهيل.
ipa: maː ʔariːd ɡahwa xalliː niʃrab tʃaːj bilheːl
gloss_en: I don't want coffee, let's drink tea with cardamom.
notes: ق=/ɡ/ gilit reflex in gahwa (blanc1964 §3.25); چ=/tʃ/ čāy (erwin1963: kaf affrication written چ); geminate لّ

sentence: اِشْتَرَيت ثَلَث كِيلُو طَمَاطَة مِن اِلسُّوگ بِخَمْسَة آلَاف.
raw: اشتريت ثلث كيلو طماطة من السوگ بخمسة آلاف.
ipa: ʔiʃtareːt θalaθ tʃiːluː tˤɑmɑːtˤɑ min issuːɡ bixamsa ʔaːlaːf
gloss_en: I bought three kilos of tomatoes from the market for five thousand.
notes: interdental ث retained /θ/ (blanc1964: gilit retains interdentals); سُوگ with گ=/ɡ/ (erwin1963 orthography)

sentence: هَاذَا اِلْمُعَلِّم اِلْجِدِيد ظَلّ يِحْچِي وِيَّانَا لِلظُّهُر.
raw: هاذا المعلم الجديد ظل يحچي ويانا للظهر.
ipa: haːðaː ilmuʕallim ildʒidiːd ðˤɑll jiħtʃiː wijjaːnaː liðˤðˤuhur
gloss_en: This new teacher kept talking with us until noon.
notes: ذ retained /ð/ in hāða; ظ=/ðˤ/ retained (blanc1964); يِحْچِي 'talks' with چ (erwin1963 s.v. حچى); wiyyā- 'with' (erwin1963)
